---
name: Docs / policy change
about: Track changes to governance, process, or documentation structure
title: "[DocsPolicy]: "
labels: ["documentation", "governance"]
assignees: []
---

## Change summary

Describe what policy or doc behavior changes.

## Policy area

- [ ] Documentation lane contract
- [ ] Workflow traceability
- [ ] Coding standards
- [ ] CI/quality gate
- [ ] Other

## Required updates

- [ ] Agent lane document(s)
- [ ] Human lane document(s)
- [ ] `docs/README.md` index link(s)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` Unreleased entry

## Traceability

- Planned branch name: `docs/<issue-id>-short-description`
- Related runbook/matrix section:
